name: nest-native-lockout-workspace
description: Community standalone monorepo for @authlock/core, @nest-native/lockout, and samples

scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @authlock/core && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test:cov: c8 --all --include "packages/core/**/*.ts" --exclude "packages/core/test/**" --exclude "packages/core/index.ts" --exclude "packages/core/**/index.ts" --exclude "packages/core/interfaces.ts" --exclude "**/*.d.ts" --exclude "**/dist/**" --reporter text --reporter text-summary --reporter json-summary --reporter lcov --check-coverage --branches 100 --functions 100 --lines 100 --statements 100 npm run test:report
scripts.release:check: npm run release:check:readme-links && npm run release:check:sample-versions && npm run release:check:pack && npm run release:check:consumer
scripts.ci:docs: npm --prefix website ci && npm --prefix website run build
scripts.security:audit: npm run security:audit:package && npm run security:audit:docs
scripts.sample: npm run showcase && npm run sample:focused
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run test:cov && npm run test:nestjs && npm run complexity:check && npm run complexity:report && npm run release:check && npm run ci:docs && npm run security:audit && npm run ci:sample
scripts.test:full: npm run test && LOCKOUT_POSTGRES_URL=postgres://lockout:lockout@127.0.0.1:54329/lockout LOCKOUT_MYSQL_URL=mysql://lockout:lockout@127.0.0.1:33069/lockout npm run test:integration
scripts.test:mutant:full: npm run test:mutant && LOCKOUT_POSTGRES_URL=postgres://lockout:lockout@127.0.0.1:54329/lockout LOCKOUT_MYSQL_URL=mysql://lockout:lockout@127.0.0.1:33069/lockout npm run test:integration:mutant
